'''Borth Pazz''' was a citizen of [[Lorrd/Legends|Lorrd]] as of [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. Despite lacking [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitivity]], he dressed himself in [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]][[Jedi apparel/Legends|-style robes]] and carried a non-functional, pre-[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] he'd stolen from a museum. Spurred on by the mysterious [[Lumiya|Brisha Syo]], he demanded that [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] teach him a single Jedi [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]] or he'd jump from the summit of a building. After over an hour of fruitless negotiation, Jacen tired and allowed him to jump. However, Pazz's [[Death/Legends|suicide]] attempt failed, with [[Nelani Dinn]] and [[Ben Skywalker]] managing to slow down Pazz's fall with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Pazz ended the day with a broken ankle, screaming of his betrayal by the Jedi.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}}
